title: The Quality Pack
description: A small pack that I decided to share for people to have fun on!
body:
The Quality Pack is a modpack that you play to get the better features of Minecraft that Mojang didn't want to add. 

The modpack includes:
- Improvements to biome generation using mods like Wilder Wild
- Wilder Wild also improves the tree generation, which makes the world look more sleek
- It allows the addition of features Mojang would not add e.g. amethyst tools or axes getting looting and even impaling in the rain for Java
- It allows for banners to be used as flags
- An overhaul of the chatting system with cooler animation and looks of the messages
- It adds a bundle crafting recipe for the weirdos that prefer them over literally anything else
- You can explore the depths of the improved end from the Better End mod which completely overhauls the end biomes and even adds some additional armour sets and tools for you to get after beating the dragon
- You now have the combat roll from Minecraft Dungeons 
- You have the ease of fast quitting and tree chopping
- Better farming including right click replant with hoes
- Inventory management additions
- Jade and JEI to know exactly what your look at and the crafting recipe
- I've added a light mod called Legacies and Legends to add a few high detail structures
- Better village trading through trading posts and a bunch of village additions from various other mods

If someone does actually play this modpack, Join the discord and give me some feedback I genuinely started this not that long ago and I'm open to feedback be it errors or just general shit mods that should be removed. If you need anything I am usually available so ping me and let me know! Enjoy!
